trial_details.trajectory:
The pod status shows "ErrImageNeverPull", indicating an issue with the container image.The describe command shows that the container image "misspeling-app:latset" is not found, causing the "ErrImageNeverPull" error.The issue was a misspelling in the container image name, so I patched the deployment to use the correct image "misspelling-app:latest".

FIX COMPLETE

## COMMANDS EXECUTED:
1. $ kubectl get pod misspelling-deployment-6579ff5454-d75fm -n case6-test
   Output: NAME                                      READY   STATUS              RESTARTS   AGE
misspelling-deployment-6579ff5454-d75fm   0/1     ErrImageNeverPull   0          12s...
2. $ kubectl describe pod misspelling-deployment-6579ff5454-d75fm -n case6-test
   Output: Name:             misspelling-deployment-6579ff5454-d75fm
Namespace:        case6-test
Priority:         0
Service Account:  default
Node:             minikube/192.168.49.2
Start Time:       Thu, 25 D...
3. $ kubectl patch deployment misspelling-deployment -n case6-test --type=json -p='[{"op":"replace","path":"/spec/template/spec/containers/0/image","value":"misspelling-app:latest"}]'
   Output: deployment.apps/misspelling-deployment patched...
